item.title: MOIL Ltd Gains 12.05%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Volatile Week
item.description: MOIL Ltd’s shares experienced significant volatility during the week ending 20 March 2026, ultimately closing with a strong gain of 12.05% despite a challenging market backdrop. The stock’s performance notably outpaced the Sensex, which declined marginally by 0.28% over the same period. This review analyses the key events and underlying factors that shaped MOIL’s price action, including sharp intraday swings, rating changes, valuation shifts, and sectoral dynamics. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST

item.title: D B Corp Ltd Gains 2.94%: 2 Key Valuation and Price Moves This Week
item.description: D B Corp Ltd’s shares advanced by 2.94% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.206.60 compared to Rs.200.70 the previous Friday. This performance notably outpaced the Sensex, which declined marginally by 0.28% during the same period. The week was marked by a recovery from a 52-week low and improved valuation metrics, despite ongoing challenges in profitability and market sentiment. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST

item.title: Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd Surges 25.01%: 7 Key Developments Shaping the Week
item.description: Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd delivered a remarkable weekly performance, surging 25.01% from Rs.430.50 to Rs.538.15 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined marginally by 0.28% over the same period. This sharp rebound followed a 52-week low on 16 March and was supported by heavy trading volumes, strong institutional interest, and a series of technical and valuation shifts that shaped investor sentiment throughout the week. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST

item.title: Deccan Cements Declines 0.65%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Downtrend
item.description: Deccan Cements Ltd. closed the week ending 20 March 2026 at Rs.647.40, down 0.65% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.651.65. This modest decline came amid a broader market pullback, with the Sensex falling 0.28% over the same period to 33,423.61. The stock’s performance was marked by volatility and bearish technical signals, culminating in a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO on 19 March. Investors faced a challenging week as deteriorating financial metrics and negative momentum weighed on sentiment. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST

item.title: Sylph Industries Ltd Falls 9.68%: 3 Key Technical Signals Driving the Week
item.description: Sylph Industries Ltd experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its share price declining by 9.68% to close at Rs.0.84, underperforming the Sensex which fell marginally by 0.28%. Despite hitting new 52-week highs early in the week, the stock faced profit-taking and volatility amid mixed market conditions and technical shifts, culminating in a notable weekly loss for the micro-cap software company. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST

item.title: Aksh Optifibre Gains 1.76%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Move
item.description: Aksh Optifibre Ltd experienced a volatile week, ultimately closing with a modest gain of 1.76% against a Sensex decline of 0.28%. The stock’s trajectory was marked by a sharp fall to a 52-week low on 16 March, followed by a dramatic rebound hitting the upper circuit on 17 March. These contrasting moves highlight a week of intense market activity and shifting investor sentiment. Time: Mar 21 2026 03:07 PM IST
